Notes: Single UPDATE attempts to add a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name in the same message. The zone starts with alias.campus.edu. already having A data so the UPDATE can expose whether the server rejects the packet, applies one prerequisite-dependent change only, or normalizes the resulting node.

Steps.Description: Add a CNAME and an A RR at alias.campus.edu. in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe which RRset, if any, remains at the conflicted owner name.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Check whether A data survives after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Check whether the CNAME survives after the UPDATE.
